channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Integrated Transport Strategy for Kigoma's Economic Growth
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan is set to launch the Standard Gauge Railway (SGR) from Tabora to Kigoma, a project that has long been a priority for the region. However, the success of this railway depe...

item.title: Footballer Ramos and his wife respond to fan's controversial comment about their relationship
item.description: The article details a situation involving Spanish footballer Sergio Ramos and his wife, Pau Català, following a fan's provocative comment on social media. The fan's message, which suggested that Ramos...

item.title: Suspect Arrested for Aerial Fire Near Minister's Vehicle, Safe City Tech Used
item.description: A young man has been arrested for allegedly firing aerial shots near the vehicle of Information Minister Attaullah Tarar in Lahore's Defence area. Police tracked down the suspect using Safe City surve...

item.title: Wife of hunger-striking activist Sonam Wangchuk alleges illegal detention after hospital transfer
item.description: Indian activist Sonam Wangchuk, who has been on a hunger strike since June 28 to protest alleged irregularities and question paper leaks in a major university entrance examination, was shifted to a go...

item.title: Tanzania-Egypt Forum Discusses Trade and Investment Growth Strategies
item.description: The Tanzania-Egypt forum convened to outline strategies for enhancing trade relations and fostering investment growth between the two nations. Discussions focused on identifying key sectors for collab...

item.title: Tamil Writer D Ravikumar's Stories Explore Contemporary Dalit Struggles
item.description: D Ravikumar's collection of short stories, 'An Ocean in a Well,' delves into the harsh realities faced by Dalits through personal narratives. The tales highlight systemic injustice, caste-based oppres...

item.title: Sam Burns Surpasses Expectations, Takes Lead in British Open After Last-Minute Decision
item.description: Sam Burns, a New Zealand golfer, has taken the lead in the British Open after a dramatic last-minute decision to compete. Two weeks after his daughter's birth and just a week before the tournament, Bu...

item.title: US-Iran Conflict's Impact on Australia's Labour Market and Unemployment Rate
item.description: The article discusses the potential economic implications of the escalating US-Iran conflict on Australia's labour market and unemployment rate. Despite resilient jobs data, the prolonged Middle East ...

item.title: Ferry Capsizes Off Guyana Coast, 8 Survivors Rescued Amid Ongoing Search
item.description: An emergency rescue operation is underway after the passenger ferry MV Barima capsized off the coast of Guyana, leaving 116 people stranded at sea. The vessel departed Port Kaituma on Saturday afterno...

item.title: Fuel Price Hike Expected to Impact Motorists and Businesses
item.description: The article discusses the anticipated surge in fuel prices, prompting motorists and businesses to prepare for increased operational costs. With oil prices on the rise, transportation sectors and comme...

item.title: Historical Spring-Loaded Shoes of the 1930s and Their Evolution into Modern Rebound Boots
item.description: This article explores the origins of kangaroo jumps (or rebound/jumping shoes) from the 1930s, which were early spring-loaded footwear toys. These devices, often called 'moon shoes' or 'spring-heel sh...

item.title: Meta Platforms Experience Brief Outages Amid User Reports
item.description: A recent report indicates that Facebook and Instagram, both owned by Meta, experienced brief outages on July 19, 2026. Pakistani users first reported issues with Facebook around 12:30pm, with outage r...

item.title: Supercomputer Predicts Spain vs Argentina in 2026 World Cup Final
item.description: The Opta supercomputer has analyzed 25,000 simulations to predict the 2026 FIFA World Cup final between Spain and Argentina. Spain, the reigning European champions, are favored with a 59.6% chance of ...

item.title: Botlhale Boikanyo's Journey from Child Prodigy to Poet
item.description: Botlhale Boikanyo, a South African poet who gained fame at 11 as the first spoken-word artist on South Africa’s Got Talent, reflects on her journey from a township in Mahikeng to becoming a master’s s...

item.title: Geological Journey of the World's Largest Diamonds Revealed
item.description: The article explores the origins of CLIPPIR diamonds, a rare class of diamonds formed over 400km beneath the Earth's surface in the mantle transition zone. These diamonds, including the Cullinan, Lese...

item.title: 90s grunge musician Jennifer Finch passes away at 59 after battling brain cancer
item.description: Jennifer Finch, the bassist and vocalist of the 1990s grunge band L7, has died at the age of 59 following a prolonged battle with an aggressive form of cancer. The news was shared via her official Ins...

item.title: Trump Comments on Iran Conflict After U.S. Casualties
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump addressed the escalating tensions with Iran following a deadly strike on a U.S. military base in Jordan, which killed two service members and left a third missing. During a...

item.title: Georgina Njenga Reflects on Past Relationship with Baha
item.description: Georgina Njenga, mother of Baha's daughter, has addressed the recent scandal surrounding her ex-partner, Machachari actor Baha. She clarified that the controversy is not new to her, as she had already...

item.title: Kaizer Chiefs and Orlando Pirates Conclude Pre-Season Preparations Ahead of New Campaign
item.description: Kaizer Chiefs and Orlando Pirates have completed their pre-season European tours, with both teams focusing on refining strategies ahead of the new Betway Premiership season. Chiefs, under new head coa...

item.title: Fatal cross-border police pursuit ends with armed driver's death in NSW
item.description: A chaotic cross-border police chase has concluded tragically with the death of an armed driver in New South Wales. The incident began when Queensland Police responded to reports of a man armed with a ...
